g.text: What style of music is this? What's the right attitude to play it?
Why did you make nested notation? What inspired its creation,
Is there any kind of admin managing each session?

g.serif:id: Is there an end to the piece
g.text: Is there an end to the piece?
What's the best gear to bring to a nested notation session?
has started, there is no particular frame or node that will serve
as the best ending if reached.
Each of the corners has, however, its 'self ring', or 'refocus ring', which has no ﬁeld or song
audio available. These refocus rings are meant to serve as a respite if necessary, and they make
Typically, in a nested notation session, a given duration is set, and at the appointed time, a
session manager will hold the session such that no more votes may be cast, and then pause it, to
signal the end of the session.
